items.name: Swept Messy Black Hair With Cap And Headphones 2.0
items.description:
🎁 Get this limited UGC in the game: 
https://www.roblox.com/games/108903312165288/Sleep-For-UGC

Upgrade your avatar with the ultimate street-ready combo: Swept Messy Black Hair with Cap and Headphones! This stylish set blends a naturally messy, layered hairstyle with a sleek cap and modern headphones for a cool, laid-back vibe. Perfect for casual fits, edgy looks, or anime-inspired outfits, this accessory adds depth, attitude, and personality to your character. Stand out effortlessly with a look that feels both relaxed and bold.
